# 有时 · 命理 Sources Index

> Generated by `npm run kb:mingli`. Do not edit by hand.

Updated: 2026-04-30

## Source tiers

- **A** — 经典/原典/通行古籍，优先用于算法规则和术语定义；需要版本校勘。
- **B** — 现代学术或严肃研究，用于历史、文化、人类学、心理/产品解释框架。
- **C** — 成熟软件库、排盘网站、多源对照材料，用于工程交叉验证；不能单独作为最终理论依据。
- **D** — 现代门派/实务教材/网络资料，只能作为启发或待核对材料。

## Domains

### ziwei

## Claims

### bazi.adjusting-climate.yongshen

- Domain: bazi
- Claim: 调候用神强调出生月令/季节气候对日主状态的影响，不能只按五行数量机械判断。
- Sources: `bazi-qiongtong-baojian`, `bazi-ditiansui`
- Repo refs: `lib/bazi/BaziEngine.ts`
- Confidence: medium
- Status: implemented_needs_text_citation

### bazi.branch-relations.not-absolute-omens

- Domain: bazi
- Claim: 六合、三合、六害、三刑在古籍中均有象数/生旺/死绝/格局语境，不应在产品中被机械表达为绝对吉凶或恐吓式断语。
- Sources: `bazi-sanming-tonghui`, `academic-mingli-history-lu`
- Repo refs: `lib/bazi/BaziEngine.ts`, `lib/bazi/DayunEngine.ts`, `docs/mingli/reading-notes/2026-04-29-reading-log.md`
- Confidence: medium_high
- Status: active_product_interpretation_policy

### bazi.day-master.month-command.core

- Domain: bazi
- Claim: 子平格局法以日干配月令为取用/取格核心；月令是判断旺衰、格局和格局用神的重要入口，但仍需结合透干、藏干、会合、四柱损益与岁运通变，不能把月支主气机械等同完整格局。
- Sources: `bazi-yuanhai-ziping`, `bazi-ziping-zhenquan`
- Repo refs: `lib/bazi/BaziEngine.ts`, `docs/mingli/reading-notes/2026-04-30-yuanhai-ziping-first-pass.md`, `docs/mingli/reading-notes/2026-04-30-ziping-zhenquan-first-pass.md`
- Confidence: medium_high
- Status: text_cited_needs_algorithm_review

### bazi.dayun.requires-tongbian

- Domain: bazi
- Claim: 大运/岁运不能按单一干支、五行或神煞死法直断；需把运干/运支配回原局月令喜忌、格局成败与相神救应统观，并注意似喜实忌、似忌实喜、干支不同用、冲合缓急轻重等通变。
- Sources: `bazi-yuanhai-ziping`, `bazi-ziping-zhenquan`, `bazi-ditiansui`
- Repo refs: `lib/bazi/DayunEngine.ts`, `docs/mingli/reading-notes/2026-04-30-yuanhai-ziping-first-pass.md`, `docs/mingli/reading-notes/2026-04-30-ziping-zhenquan-first-pass.md`
- Confidence: medium_high
- Status: text_cited_policy_needs_copy_audit

### bazi.geju.mvp-simplified

- Domain: bazi
- Claim: 当前 BaziEngine.determineGeJu 以从格/专旺/化气粗筛后，直接用月支主气十神命名正格，并用五行用忌粗分上中下；对照《子平真诠》，它缺少月令藏干透出取舍、会合变化、相神、成败救应、星辰降权与行运通变，只能作为 MVP heuristic。
- Sources: `bazi-yuanhai-ziping`, `bazi-ziping-zhenquan`
- Repo refs: `lib/bazi/BaziEngine.ts`, `docs/mingli/reading-notes/2026-04-30-yuanhai-ziping-first-pass.md`, `docs/mingli/reading-notes/2026-04-30-ziping-zhenquan-first-pass.md`
- Confidence: high_for_repo_assessment_medium_for_classical_scope
- Status: mvp_simplified_needs_classical_audit

### bazi.hidden-stems.table

- Domain: bazi
- Claim: 地支藏干表是八字五行力量、十神透藏、格局判断的重要基础表；《渊海子平》藏遁歌与《三命通会》可互校，代码表需明确采用版本。
- Sources: `bazi-yuanhai-ziping`, `bazi-sanming-tonghui`
- Repo refs: `lib/bazi/BaziEngine.ts`, `docs/mingli/reading-notes/2026-04-30-yuanhai-ziping-first-pass.md`, `docs/mingli/reading-notes/2026-04-29-reading-log.md`
- Confidence: medium_high_for_common_table_medium_for_version
- Status: text_cited_needs_version_fixture

### bazi.siling.table.contested

- Domain: bazi
- Claim: 月令人元司事/司令表用于描述节气后不同藏干当值，但《三命通会》卷二同页正文、玉井引表与当前代码表存在天数差异；进入算法解释时必须标明采用版本，不能把当前表默认为唯一古籍定本。
- Sources: `bazi-sanming-tonghui`, `bazi-yuanhai-ziping`
- Repo refs: `lib/bazi/SiLing.ts`, `docs/mingli/reading-notes/2026-04-29-reading-log.md`, `docs/mingli/reading-notes/2026-04-30-yuanhai-ziping-first-pass.md`
- Confidence: high_for_disagreement_low_for_single_table
- Status: contested

### bazi.ten-gods.core

- Domain: bazi
- Claim: 十神以日主为中心，按目标天干与日主之间的五行生克和阴阳同异推导，形成官杀、财、印枭、食伤、比劫五类/十神关系；产品解释应将其转译为结构关系，而非固定天干标签或绝对性格断语。
- Sources: `bazi-yuanhai-ziping`
- Repo refs: `lib/bazi/BaziEngine.ts`, `lib/bazi/DayunEngine.ts`, `docs/mingli/reading-notes/2026-04-30-yuanhai-ziping-first-pass.md`
- Confidence: medium_high_for_rule_low_for_full_interpretation
- Status: text_cited_needs_fixture

### bazi.wuxing.seasonal-prosperity.requires-tongbian

- Domain: bazi
- Claim: 五行旺相休囚死说明五行随四时得令/失令，但原文同时强调生旺未必吉、休囚死绝未必凶，必须结合制化、生扶与通变判断。
- Sources: `bazi-sanming-tonghui`
- Repo refs: `lib/bazi/BaziEngine.ts`, `docs/mingli/reading-notes/2026-04-29-reading-log.md`
- Confidence: medium_high
- Status: text_cited_needs_algorithm_review

### bazi.ziping-zhenquan.geju-chengbai-jiuying

- Domain: bazi
- Claim: 格局名称不是判断结论；《子平真诠》要求以四柱配月令用神判断成格、败格、带忌与救应，破格也可能因合、印、食、财、会合等救应而复成。
- Sources: `bazi-ziping-zhenquan`
- Repo refs: `lib/bazi/BaziEngine.ts`, `docs/mingli/reading-notes/2026-04-30-ziping-zhenquan-first-pass.md`
- Confidence: medium_high_for_first_pass_text_low_for_edition
- Status: new_claim_needs_algorithm_design

### bazi.ziping-zhenquan.month-command-yongshen

- Domain: bazi
- Claim: 《子平真诠》的格局用神“专求月令”，以日干配月令地支定财官印食、杀伤劫刃等格局主轴；但月令无可用之物或藏干不一时，仍须看透干、会支与四柱配合另取，不等于只读月支主气。
- Sources: `bazi-ziping-zhenquan`
- Repo refs: `lib/bazi/BaziEngine.ts`, `docs/mingli/reading-notes/2026-04-30-ziping-zhenquan-first-pass.md`
- Confidence: medium_high_for_first_pass_text_low_for_edition
- Status: text_cited_needs_better_edition_fixture

### bazi.ziping-zhenquan.stars-do-not-decide-geju

- Domain: bazi
- Claim: 《子平真诠》“论星辰无关格局”明确神煞/星辰不能操格局成败之权；产品可把神煞作为辅助文化标签，但不能用天德贵人、孤辰等覆盖月令格局、生克与成败判断。
- Sources: `bazi-ziping-zhenquan`
- Repo refs: `lib/bazi/BaziEngine.ts`, `docs/mingli/reading-notes/2026-04-30-ziping-zhenquan-first-pass.md`
- Confidence: medium_high_for_first_pass_text_low_for_edition
- Status: active_product_interpretation_policy

### bazi.ziping-zhenquan.xiangshen-critical

- Domain: bazi
- Claim: 《子平真诠》称“凡全局之格，赖此一字而成者，均谓之相”；相神是辅助月令用神成格的关键字，相神受伤可立败其格，因此格局解释需要记录相神及其是否受破。
- Sources: `bazi-ziping-zhenquan`
- Repo refs: `docs/mingli/reading-notes/2026-04-30-ziping-zhenquan-first-pass.md`
- Confidence: medium_high_for_first_pass_text_low_for_edition
- Status: new_claim_needs_algorithm_design

### bazi.ziping-zhenquan.yongshen-variation

- Domain: bazi
- Claim: 《子平真诠》“用神变化”指出月令藏干透出、三合/会局等会使命局由本格变化为财、官、印、杀、食伤等不同格局；算法若不处理透干与会合变化，只能称为简化取格。
- Sources: `bazi-ziping-zhenquan`
- Repo refs: `lib/bazi/BaziEngine.ts`, `docs/mingli/reading-notes/2026-04-30-ziping-zhenquan-first-pass.md`
- Confidence: medium_high_for_first_pass_text_low_for_edition
- Status: new_claim_needs_algorithm_design

### product.no-absolute-fortune-claims

- Domain: product-framing
- Claim: 有时的输出应以传统文化框架 + 现代自我观察语言表达，避免绝对预测、恐吓式断语和医学/财务/法律确定性建议。
- Sources: `academic-mingli-history-lu`, `journal-zhouyi-research`
- Repo refs: `lib/ai/index.ts`, `docs/superpowers/specs/2026-04-25-ai-orchestration-and-divination-systems-design.md`
- Confidence: high_as_product_policy
- Status: active_policy

### qimen.require-three-source-verification

- Domain: qimen
- Claim: 奇门规则表进入代码前至少用一个经典文本和两个独立排盘/资料源交叉验证；分歧条目标记为 contested，不 silently choose。
- Sources: `qimen-quanshu`, `qimen-ziwei-pro`, `qimen-qimendunjia-net`
- Repo refs: `docs/superpowers/specs/2026-04-25-qimen-divination-design.md`
- Confidence: high_as_process_policy
- Status: active_policy

### ziwei.four-transformations.by-year-stem

- Domain: ziwei
- Claim: 紫微四化（禄、权、科、忌）按生年天干取星，例如《紫微斗数全书》卷二给出“甲廉破武阳”等口诀；工程实现需与 iztro 输出和至少一处独立排盘源对照。
- Sources: `ziwei-doushu-quanshu`, `ziwei-iztro`
- Repo refs: `lib/ziwei/ZiweiEngine.ts`, `docs/mingli/reading-notes/2026-04-29-reading-log.md`
- Confidence: medium
- Status: text_cited_needs_fixture

### ziwei.interpretation.requires-context

- Domain: ziwei
- Claim: 紫微解释需要结合星曜分野、十二宫、庙陷/失度、身命与照合语境，不能只按单颗星曜输出孤立断语。
- Sources: `ziwei-doushu-quanshu`
- Repo refs: `lib/ai/tools/ziwei.ts`, `docs/mingli/reading-notes/2026-04-29-reading-log.md`
- Confidence: medium
- Status: text_cited_policy

### ziwei.ming-shen-placement.rule

- Domain: ziwei
- Claim: 紫微命宫从寅上起正月顺数至生月，再从生月起子时逆数至生时；身宫从生月起子时顺数至生时。闰月处理需另做版本/实现核对。
- Sources: `ziwei-doushu-quanshu`, `ziwei-iztro`
- Repo refs: `lib/ziwei/ZiweiEngine.ts`, `docs/mingli/reading-notes/2026-04-29-reading-log.md`
- Confidence: medium
- Status: text_cited_needs_fixture

### ziwei.use-library-for-charting

- Domain: ziwei
- Claim: 紫微排盘工程实现阶段使用 iztro 生成星盘；解释层必须回链紫微古籍/门派 sources，不能只引用软件库。
- Sources: `ziwei-iztro`, `ziwei-doushu-quanshu`, `ziwei-doushu-quanji`
- Repo refs: `lib/ziwei/ZiweiEngine.ts`, `docs/superpowers/specs/2026-04-25-ai-orchestration-and-divination-systems-design.md`
- Confidence: high_for_engineering_low_for_theory
- Status: active_policy
